rationale.R1.5: The revised section proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the original's structural reorganization issues.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is strong as the authors recall prior-work names from memory and suggest reasonable defaults for Reynolds-number range and seed count.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is excellent as the revised benchmark clearly defines its scope and task categories, distinguishing itself from prior benchmarks.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is good as the authors report a normalized composite score that avoids privileging architectures with unbounded compute.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are excellent as the revised benchmark provides clear attribution to reference solutions and verifies manifest errors.
